title: bl.imp2~

flags.name: -midi
flags.description:
sets frequency input in MIDI pitch
default: Hz

flags.name: -mc <list>
flags.description: sets multichannel output with a list of frequencies

methods.description: non-0 sets to frequency input in MIDI pitch
<channel, freq> sets a single frequency channel

body: [bl.imp2~] is a two sided impulse oscillator like [else/imp2~], but it is bandlimited with the upsampling/filtering technique. This makes the object quite inefficient CPU wise, but is an easy way to implement a bandlimited oscillator.
